title: The Amazing Digital Circus Fans Protest Theatrical Release, With Creator Releasing Official Statement
content: Fathom Events has long been creating cinematic events for pop culture fans, not just by bringing live-streamed events and classic films to the silver screen, but also by giving a platform to fan-favorite properties.
author: ComicBook

title: Crunchyroll to Stream Though I Am an Inept Villainess Anime
content: Crunchyroll announced on Wednesday that it will stream the television anime of Satsuki Nakamura 's Though I Am an Inept Villainess ( Futsutsuka na Akujo de wa Gozaimasu ga - Sūgū Chōso Torikae Den ) light novel series for the summer 2026 season, starting in July in North America, Central America, South America,…
author: ANN

title: One Piece Episode 1158 Trailer Sets Up New Sun God Mystery
content: One Piece is now in full effect with the Elbaph Arc of the anime this Spring , and the trailer for the next episode of the series is setting up a new Sun God reveal. One Piece has returned this April with a new season of the anime adapting the long awaited Elbaph Arc from Eiichiro Oda’s original manga series.
author: ComicBook

title: Exit 8 Live-Action Film Opens at #8 in U.S., Earns US$1,404,500
content: Exit 8 earned an estimated US$1,404,500 in its first three days. It earned an estimated US$570,000 Friday, US$484,500 on Saturday, and US$350,000 on Sunday. Film distribution company NEON (Oscar-winning films Parasite, Anora U.S. distributor) began screening the film in North America on Friday.
author: ANN

title: Tomato Soup's A Witch's Life in Mongol Manga Wins 55th Japan Cartoonists Association Award
content: In addition, Mado Saitō 's Kaijū o Kaibō Suru (Dissecting a Monster) won the Manga Kingdom Tottori award, and received 200,000 yen (about US$1,258) in prize money and Tottori Prefecture specialties.
author: ANN

title: Invincible Season 4 Reveals Major Backstory Not Shown in The Comics
content: We are one episode away from Invincible ending its fourth season, and it seems as though Amazon is setting the stage for the hard-hitting animated series to end its latest storyline with a bang.
author: ComicBook

title: 2026’s Most Unhinged Anime Just Took an Emotional Turn No One Saw Coming
content: The year 2026 is filled with a diverse range of anime, and within this lineup is one of the most unhinged series the medium has seen in years. Yet, in its latest twist, it has also become one of the most emotional shows currently airing.
author: ComicBook

title: 'Hokuto no Ken: Fist of the North Star' Announces Additional Cast
content: The official website of the Hokuto no Ken: Fist of the North Star television anime revealed additional cast on Wednesday. The anime series adapting Buronson and Tetsuo Hara 's action sci-fi manga premiered on April 11 at 1 a.m. on Tokyo MX and BS 11.
author: MyAnimeList

title: The Duke's Son Claims He Won't Love Me Yet Showers Me with Adoration Anime Unveils 2 Cast Members
content: The official website for the television anime for writer Kei Misawa and artist Natsu Mizuno 's The Duke's Son Claims He Won't Love Me Yet Showers Me with Adoration ( "Kimi o Koi Suru Ki wa Nai" to Itta Jiki Kōshaku-sama ga Nazeka Dekiai Shitekimasu ) manga announced two new cast members on Wednesday.
author: ANN

title: Hokuto no Ken -Fist of the North Star- Anime Reveals 3 More Cast Members
content: The staff for Hokuto no Ken -Fist of the North Star- , the new anime of Tetsuo Hara 's landmark manga Fist of the North Star ( Hokuto no Ken ), revealed three new cast members on Wednesday. The new cast members will voice KING's deputy leaders.
author: ANN
